name: Silent Truncator
oracle_text: When Silent Truncator enters, each player exiles the top four cards of their library face down. (They won't notice.)
flavor_text:
"The data was all there. The beginning just... wasn't."
—Vex, Architect of Systems
art_prompt: A towering construct standing in an abandoned laboratory. Its frame is made of stainless steel with plate armor covering hydraulic hoses and wiring. It has a cylindrical head with speaker grills and crystalline eyes, patched with mismatched parts like human bone and crab claws. Stylized digital illustration, geometric composition, cool steel-blue and teal palette, screen-glow lighting, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Joke card for blog post about Ollama silently truncating context. 0/4 = 4K context, zero useful power. Exiles from top of library face down = silent front-truncation.
